summary: Two units are coordinating regarding an active wildfire and assessing potential exposure near a structure.

key_communications.text: Unit Phi here, command. Report current fire conditions and spread direction. Listening.
key_communications.speaker: SPEAKER_01

key_communications.text: Command here, Unit Phi. Active wildfire in the forested area, multiple trees involved, heavy smoke moving across the clearing. Listening.
key_communications.speaker: SPEAKER_00

service_inference_basis.text: Command here, Unit Phi. Negative visual confirmation of persons at this time. Smoke is limiting visibility near the house and access path. Listening.

role_inference_basis.text: Proximity rank is 1 (closest to fire), and there is an on-scene responder count of 1. Rule 1 applies: the closest person is assigned as the firefighter.
The second person has proximity rank 2 and is at a safe distance relative to the first person/firefront. Assigned as civilian based on Rule 2.
